Skardu is the gateway to the Baltoro glacier and the trek toward K2 base camp.

hazards.note: Extreme pre-monsoon heat in the plains
Monsoon — flooding risk

seasonal.d: May-Oct is the season for the northern valleys and high-altitude trekking.
Oct-Mar brings cool, comfortable weather to Lahore and the plains.

PK.summary: Karakoram giants, the Hunza Valley and Mughal Lahore — checks advisories by region.

activities.d: Krakow's beautifully preserved medieval old town surrounds Europe's largest market square.
Poland holds sobering WWII history — the Auschwitz-Birkenau memorial and Warsaw's uprising museums.
Krakow's old Jewish Kazimierz quarter is packed with atmospheric, low-cost bars and clubs.
Zakopane, in the Tatra Mountains, is Poland's go-to hiking and skiing resort town.

seasonal.d: Late spring to early autumn offers the mildest weather for Poland's cities and mountains.
December brings charming Christmas markets to Krakow's and Warsaw's old squares.

PL.summary: Krakow and Gdansk old towns, mountain trails and hearty food.

activities.d: Old San Juan's colourful Spanish-colonial streets and seaside forts are the island's historic heart.
Vieques has the world's brightest bioluminescent bay, glowing electric blue at night.
El Yunque is the only tropical rainforest in the US national forest system, laced with waterfalls.
Culebra's Flamenco Beach regularly ranks among the world's most beautiful.

seasonal.d: Dec-Apr is peak season — dry, breezy and sunny, ideal for the beaches and El Yunque.
Jun-Nov is hurricane season, peaking Aug-Oct — keep an eye on forecasts.

PR.summary: Old San Juan's blue cobblestones, bioluminescent bays and rainforest — no passport needed for Americans.

activities.d: Bethlehem's Church of the Nativity marks the traditional birthplace of Jesus.
Jericho, among the world's oldest cities, sits near the Dead Sea's northern shore.
Ramallah is the lively cultural and culinary hub of the West Bank.
Hebron's old city and the Ibrahimi Mosque / Tomb of the Patriarchs are deeply revered and historic.

seasonal.d: Spring and autumn bring the mildest, most comfortable weather for visiting.

PS.summary: Bethlehem, Jericho and Hebron's layered heritage — currently subject to severe travel warnings.

activities.d: Lisbon's hilly old town is best explored on the rattling Tram 28, past tiled facades and miradouro viewpoints.
The Algarve's golden cliffs and coves are Portugal's sunniest beach region, also great for learning to surf.
Porto is the home of port wine — tour the riverside cellars across the Douro from the old town.
Lisbon's Bairro Alto becomes one big open-air bar crawl at night, with riverside clubs in Cais do Sodre.

hazards.note: Heat and wildfire risk inland

seasonal.d: May-September is peak Algarve beach weather — warm, dry and sunny, busiest in August.
Autumn-winter (Oct-Mar) Atlantic swells make Nazare the home of record-breaking giant waves.

PT.summary: Lisbon and Porto, Algarve beaches, surfing and port wine.

activities.d: Paraguay's ruined 17th-century Jesuit mission towns are tranquil UNESCO-listed sites.
Asuncion, one of South America's oldest capitals, is a low-key riverside city.
Paraguay's slice of the Pantanal wetlands is remote, wild and rich in birdlife.
The colossal Itaipu hydroelectric dam on the Parana is one of the largest in the world.

seasonal.d: May-Sep brings cooler, drier weather, a relief from the intense summer heat.

PY.summary: Jesuit ruins, wetlands and an off-the-path feel.

activities.d: Doha's I.M. Pei-designed Museum of Islamic Art is a world-class collection on the waterfront.
Souq Waqif is Doha's atmospheric restored market for spices, crafts and shisha cafes.
Dune-bash out to the Khor Al Adaid 'Inland Sea', where the desert meets the Gulf.
Doha's Corniche curves past a futuristic skyline, at its best around sunset.

hazards.note: Extreme heat — daytime highs of 105-115F / 40-46C

seasonal.d: Nov-Mar is the comfortable season for the beach, desert and Corniche; summer is searing.

QA.summary: Doha's museums, souqs and desert day trips.

activities.d: Transylvania's Bran Castle (tied to the Dracula legend) crowns a region of medieval Saxon towns.
Bucovina's painted monasteries are UNESCO-listed, their exterior walls covered in vivid frescoes.
The Carpathian Mountains offer hiking, brown bears and some of Europe's last wilderness.
Bucharest has a lively, affordable nightlife centred on its restored Old Town.

seasonal.d: Roughly Jul-Oct, the spectacular Transfagarasan mountain road is open and snow-free.
Late spring through early autumn is prime Carpathian hiking season.

RO.summary: Transylvania castles, painted monasteries and Carpathian hikes.

activities.d: Belgrade's floating river clubs (splavovi) make it one of Europe's best-value party cities.
Belgrade's Kalemegdan fortress overlooks the meeting of the Danube and Sava rivers.
Tara National Park offers forested gorges, hiking and the scenic Sargan Eight heritage railway.
Skadarlija is Belgrade's cobbled bohemian quarter of traditional taverns and live music.

seasonal.d: Late spring and early autumn are the most pleasant months for Belgrade.
Early July, Novi Sad's fortress hosts EXIT, one of Europe's biggest music festivals.

RS.summary: Belgrade nightlife, fortress towns and hearty food.

activities.d: St Petersburg's Hermitage and the gilded Catherine and Peterhof palaces are imperial Russia at its grandest.
Moscow's Red Square frames the Kremlin and the candy-coloured domes of St Basil's Cathedral.
The Trans-Siberian is the world's longest railway, a week-long journey across the country to the Pacific.
Lake Baikal is the world's deepest lake; Kamchatka is a remote land of volcanoes and brown bears.

seasonal.d: Jun-Aug brings warm weather and St Petersburg's 'white nights' of near-midnight sun.
Feb-Mar, Lake Baikal freezes into spectacular clear-blue ice you can walk and drive on.

RU.summary: Imperial St Petersburg, the Trans-Siberian and Kamchatka's volcanoes — under a Do Not Travel advisory.
gallery: Church of the Savior on Blood

activities.d: Volcanoes National Park, where Dian Fossey worked, offers premier mountain-gorilla trekking.
Lake Kivu's beaches and island hops are Rwanda's relaxed lakeside escape.
Kigali is one of Africa's cleanest, safest capitals, with a moving genocide memorial.
Nyungwe Forest has a treetop canopy walkway and chimpanzee tracking.

hazards.note: Heaviest rainy season

seasonal.d: Jun-Sep and Dec-Feb are the drier windows, best for trekking the forest trails.

RW.summary: Mountain gorillas, volcanoes and a famously clean capital.

activities.d: AlUla's Hegra is a stunning Nabataean city of rock-cut tombs — Saudi Arabia's answer to Petra.
The Red Sea off Jeddah offers warm, pristine coral reefs, plus the historic Al-Balad old town.
Riyadh blends gleaming towers with the mud-brick Diriyah heritage site and big new entertainment seasons.
The Rub' al Khali (Empty Quarter) is the world's largest sand desert, with towering dunes.

hazards.note: Extreme desert heat

seasonal.d: Oct-Mar brings tolerable temperatures for sightseeing and the desert; summers are extreme.

SA.summary: AlUla's tombs, Red Sea diving and fast-changing cities.

activities.d: Iron Bottom Sound is a legendary graveyard of WWII ships and planes for divers.
Marovo Lagoon is one of the world's largest saltwater lagoons, dotted with islands.
Simple village homestays are the heart of travel across these remote islands.
Guadalcanal is scattered with poignant WWII battlefields and relics.

seasonal.d: Roughly May-Oct brings drier weather and calmer seas for diving and island-hopping.

SB.summary: WWII wreck diving and village-stay island life far off the beaten path.

activities.d: Meroe's field of steep Nubian pyramids stands almost alone in the desert — Sudan has more pyramids than Egypt.
The colourful, hospitable Nubian villages along the Nile are a highlight of northern Sudan.
Khartoum sits where the Blue and White Niles famously merge into a single river.
Port Sudan accesses some of the Red Sea's most untouched, legendary dive sites.

seasonal.d: Nov-Mar brings the coolest, most comfortable desert weather.

SD.summary: More pyramids than Egypt at Meroë, Nubian hospitality — currently in conflict; Do Not Travel.

activities.d: Stockholm spreads over 14 islands, pairing the medieval Gamla Stan old town with sleek Scandinavian design.
The Stockholm archipelago's thousands of islands are made for summer boat trips and swimming.
Swedish Lapland offers winter northern lights, dog-sledding and the original Icehotel.
Stockholm has a stylish nightlife scene, liveliest during the long, light summer nights.

seasonal.d: Summer (Jun-Aug) brings long days and weather warm enough for the archipelago and outdoor life.
Sep-March, the dark northern skies of Lapland are best for catching the aurora.

SE.summary: Stockholm's archipelago, design and northern lights up north.

activities.d: Marina Bay's Gardens by the Bay 'supertrees' and the Marina Bay Sands skyline are Singapore's signature.
Singapore's hawker centres serve cheap, world-class multicultural food — even Michelin-starred stalls.
Clarke Quay's riverside bars and rooftop lounges anchor Singapore's nightlife.
Sentosa island packs beaches, Universal Studios and resorts a short hop from downtown.

seasonal.d: Singapore is hot and humid year-round; Feb-Apr tends to be the slightly drier window.

SG.summary: A food-obsessed city-state: hawker centres, gardens and shopping.

activities.d: Lake Bled, with its island church and clifftop castle, is Slovenia's iconic postcard.
Postojna Cave's underground train ride and the cliffside Predjama Castle are headline sights.
Ljubljana is a green, mostly car-free capital of riverside cafes and a hilltop castle.
Triglav National Park offers Julian Alps hiking and the glacial Lake Bohinj.

seasonal.d: Summer (Jun-Sep) is best for Alpine hiking and the lakes, with warm, settled weather.
Dec-Mar brings skiing to resorts like Kranjska Gora and Vogel.

SI.summary: Lake Bled, Julian Alps and caves in a pocket-sized country.

activities.d: Bratislava's compact old town and hilltop castle sit prettily on the Danube, near Vienna.
The High Tatras pack alpine peaks, lakes and trails into a surprisingly small range.
Slovakia has dramatic ice and aragonite caves plus thermal spa towns.
Bratislava's old-town bars and cellars make for cheap, cheerful nights out.

seasonal.d: Jun-Sep is the main hiking season in the High Tatras, once the snow melts.
Dec-Mar, the Tatras offer some of Central Europe's best-value skiing.

SK.summary: High Tatras peaks, castles everywhere and storybook old towns at gentle prices.

activities.d: Sierra Leone's peninsula beaches — Tokeh and River No. 2 — are among West Africa's most beautiful.
Tacugama, in the hills above Freetown, rescues and rehabilitates orphaned chimpanzees.
The Banana Islands offer snorkeling, slave-trade history and castaway calm.
Tiwai Island is a rainforest reserve teeming with rare primates.

seasonal.d: Nov-Apr is the dry season — the best time for the beaches and wildlife.

SL.summary: Empty palm-lined beaches, chimp sanctuaries and a warm welcome rebuilding tourism.

activities.d: Dakar is West Africa's music capital, home of mbalax and a lively arts scene.
Goree Island, off Dakar, preserves the haunting House of Slaves and its 'Door of No Return'.
Lac Rose (Lake Retba) glows pink from salt-loving algae, ringed by salt harvesters.
Saly on the Petite Cote is Senegal's main beach-resort strip.

hazards.note: Wet season

seasonal.d: Nov-May is the dry season — the most comfortable time to travel.

SN.summary: Dakar's music and markets, island history and surf.

activities.d: Laas Geel, in more stable Somaliland, has some of Africa's best-preserved prehistoric rock paintings.
Hargeisa, Somaliland's relaxed capital, centres on a bustling market and money-changer streets.
Berbera offers long, empty Gulf of Aden beaches and old Ottoman-era buildings.
Camel markets are central to Somali life — the country has among the most camels on Earth.

seasonal.d: The coast is intensely hot; the cooler months (roughly Nov-Feb) are the most bearable.

SO.summary: A long Indian Ocean coast and frankincense history — under a Do Not Travel advisory (Somaliland differs in practice).

activities.d: Paramaribo's UNESCO-listed Dutch colonial wooden architecture is unlike anywhere else in South America.
The Upper Suriname River is lined with Maroon villages and jungle river lodges.
Galibi is a nesting beach for giant leatherback sea turtles.
The Central Suriname Nature Reserve protects a vast, pristine tract of Amazon rainforest.

seasonal.d: The drier spells (roughly Feb-Apr and Aug-Nov) are best for the interior.
Leatherback turtles nest at Galibi roughly Feb-Aug, peaking in spring.

SR.summary: Dutch-colonial Paramaribo and pristine Amazonian interior lodges.
gallery: Saint Peter and Paul Cathedral, Paramaribo

activities.d: Boma-Badingilo hosts one of the largest land-mammal migrations on Earth, only recently confirmed.
The Sudd is one of the world's largest wetlands, a vast maze of Nile channels and birdlife.
Juba, the young capital, sits on the banks of the White Nile.
The Mundari people's cattle camps, built around prized long-horned cows, are a striking cultural encounter.

seasonal.d: Dec-Mar is the dry season — the only practical window for travel on the rough roads.

SS.summary: The world's youngest country; vast Sudd wetlands and huge migrations — Do Not Travel advisory.

activities.d: El Tunco and 'Bitcoin Beach' El Zonte are El Salvador's famous Pacific surf towns.
The Santa Ana volcano hike rewards you with a steaming turquoise crater lake at the top.
The Ruta de las Flores winds through coffee towns, waterfalls and weekend food fairs.
Suchitoto is a cobbled colonial town above a lake, known for its arts scene.

seasonal.d: Nov-Apr is the dry season — the most reliable time for the coast and volcanoes.
The biggest, most consistent Pacific surf swells arrive roughly Mar-Oct.

SV.summary: World-class surf points, volcano hikes and the coffee-scented Ruta de las Flores.

activities.d: Damascus, among the oldest continuously inhabited cities, centres on the great Umayyad Mosque and ancient souks.
Aleppo's mighty citadel and historic covered souqs are slowly recovering from war.
Palmyra's desert colonnades were one of the ancient world's grandest caravan cities.
Krak des Chevaliers is among the best-preserved Crusader castles in the world.

seasonal.d: Spring and autumn are the mildest seasons for the coast, desert and historic cities.

SY.summary: Damascus, Aleppo and Palmyra — among history's great cities; Do Not Travel advisory.

activities.d: Hlane and Mkhaya reserves offer reliable rhino sightings in compact, easy-going parks.
The Umhlanga Reed Dance is a vast, colourful ceremony of tens of thousands of young women.
Malolotja is a pristine highland reserve of waterfalls, hiking and a canopy zip-line.
The Ezulwini and Malkerns valleys are eSwatini's craft and cultural heartland.

seasonal.d: May-Sep (the dry season) brings the best game viewing in the reserves.
Aug-Sep brings the spectacular Umhlanga Reed Dance, eSwatini's signature festival.

SZ.summary: Walking safaris among rhinos and vibrant Swazi festivals in a tiny kingdom.

activities.d: Zakouma National Park is a conservation success story, with restored elephant herds and abundant wildlife.
The Ennedi Massif is a UNESCO wonderland of giant sandstone arches, canyons and a hidden oasis.
The Lakes of Ounianga are a surreal cluster of colourful lakes surviving in the open Sahara.
The remote Tibesti Mountains hold the Sahara's highest volcanic peaks.

seasonal.d: Nov-Feb is the cooler dry season — the only comfortable window for the desert.

TD.summary: The Ennedi's rock arches and Zakouma's elephants — expedition territory; Do Not Travel advisory.

activities.d: The remote Kerguelen Islands are a windswept subantarctic wilderness of glaciers and wildlife.
The Crozet Islands hold some of the planet's largest king penguin colonies.
These islands are vital breeding grounds for albatross, seals and seabirds.
Access is only by rare expedition or supply-ship voyage — among the hardest places on Earth to reach.

seasonal.d: The few expedition voyages run in the austral summer (roughly Nov-Mar).

TF.summary: Subantarctic islands of penguins and seals — reachable only by research/supply ship from Réunion.

activities.d: Lome's huge markets, including the famous fetish market, are the heart of the seaside capital.
Koutammakou is a UNESCO landscape of fortified mud tower-houses (takienta).
Togoville, on Lake Togo, is a centre of Vodun culture and colonial history.
Kpalime, in the cocoa-growing hills, offers waterfalls, hikes and butterflies.

seasonal.d: Nov-Mar is the dry season — the most pleasant time for the coast and northern hills.

TG.summary: Voodoo markets, hilltop clay-castle villages and palm-lined Atlantic sand.

activities.d: The Andaman coast off Phuket and Krabi is dotted with limestone karst islands, clear water and some of Asia's best-value scuba diving.
Bangkok pairs gilded temples like Wat Pho's giant reclining Buddha with legendary street food on nearly every corner.
Bangkok's rooftop bars and Koh Phangan's beach full-moon parties anchor Thailand's famous nightlife.
Cooler, mountainous Chiang Mai is the base for jungle trekking, ethical elephant sanctuaries and hill-tribe villages.

hazards.note: Smoke season in the north — burning-season haze around Chiang Mai/Chiang Rai can hit hazardous air-quality levels
Tail of the rainy season — flooding possible, especially in the central plains

seasonal.d: Nov-Apr is the Andaman dry season — calm, clear water and ideal diving around Phuket and Krabi.
The Gulf islands (Koh Samui, Koh Phangan) stay driest roughly Jan-Sep, on a different rain cycle to the Andaman coast.
Mid-April's Songkran is the Thai new year — a nationwide three-day water fight in the streets.

TH.summary: Island beaches and diving in the south, temples and street food in Bangkok and the north.

activities.d: The Pamir Highway is one of the world's great road trips, climbing remote high-altitude passes.
The Fann Mountains hold turquoise alpine lakes and accessible trekking.
The Wakhan Valley offers riverside homestays, with Afghanistan and the Hindu Kush just across the water.
Dushanbe, the laid-back capital, centres on leafy avenues and a lively bazaar.

seasonal.d: Jul-Sep is when the high Pamir passes are reliably open and snow-free.

TJ.summary: The Pamir Highway: high-altitude road-trip of a lifetime past turquoise lakes.

activities.d: Atauro Island has some of the world's most biodiverse reefs, just off the capital.
The deep Wetar Strait is a migration corridor for whales and huge dolphin pods.
A pre-dawn climb of Mount Ramelau, the highest peak, is rewarded with a sea-of-clouds sunrise.
Dili, the small seaside capital, blends Portuguese-era history with a relaxed waterfront.

seasonal.d: May-Nov is the dry season — the best window for diving and hiking.
Oct-Nov is the peak of the whale migration through the Wetar Strait.

TL.summary: Whale migrations off Ataúro's reefs and coffee-country treks in Asia's newest nation.

activities.d: The Darvaza 'Gates of Hell' is a fiery gas crater that has blazed in the desert for decades — eerie after dark.
Ashgabat is a surreal capital of white-marble buildings and gold statues.
Merv was one of the great Silk Road cities, its vast ruins now scattered across the desert.
The Yangykala canyons glow in bands of pink and red — Turkmenistan's grand-canyon landscape.

seasonal.d: Spring and autumn bring tolerable desert temperatures; summer is brutally hot.

TM.summary: The flaming Darvaza gas crater, marble Ashgabat and Silk Road Merv.

activities.d: Tunis's medina is a labyrinth of souks and mosques, beside the ancient ruins of Carthage.
El Djem's giant Roman amphitheatre rivals the Colosseum, and Carthage sits right beside the capital.
Douz, the 'gateway to the Sahara', launches camel treks into the dunes (plus a Star Wars set or two).
Hammamet and the island of Djerba are Tunisia's main Mediterranean beach resorts.

hazards.note: Peak summer heat away from the coast

seasonal.d: May-Sep is beach season on the Mediterranean coast, warm and sunny.
Oct-Apr brings cooler, more comfortable weather for desert trips.

TN.summary: Mediterranean beaches, Roman ruins and Saharan oases.

activities.d: Istanbul straddles two continents — the Hagia Sophia, Blue Mosque and labyrinthine Grand Bazaar are unmissable.
Cappadocia's surreal 'fairy chimney' valleys are best seen at dawn from a hot-air balloon.
Ephesus is one of the world's best-preserved classical cities, with its grand Roman library facade.
The turquoise Mediterranean coast around Antalya mixes resort beaches with ancient ruins.

hazards.note: Heatwaves and peak coastal crowds

seasonal.d: May-October is beach season on the Aegean and Mediterranean coasts — hot, dry and busiest mid-summer.
Spring and autumn give Cappadocia its calmest, clearest skies for ballooning.

TR.summary: Istanbul, Cappadocia balloons, ancient ruins and the turquoise coast.

activities.d: Trinidad's pre-Lenten Carnival is one of the world's great street parties — soca, steelpan and dazzling costumes.
Maracas Bay is Trinidad's favourite beach, famous for its fried 'bake and shark'.
Sister-island Tobago is the quieter half — reefs, rainforest and calm beaches.
Giant leatherback turtles haul ashore to nest on Trinidad and Tobago's beaches in spring.

seasonal.d: Carnival peaks the two days before Ash Wednesday (Feb or early March) — book far ahead.
Mar-Aug, leatherback turtles nest in huge numbers at Grande Riviere.

TT.summary: Carnival's home, steelpan and doubles on Trinidad; reef-calm beaches on Tobago.

activities.d: Taipei's night markets, like Shilin, are the soul of Taiwan's renowned street-food culture.
Taipei 101, once the world's tallest building, anchors a modern, walkable capital.
Taroko Gorge is a dramatic marble canyon with trails carved into its cliffs.
Volcanic Taiwan is dotted with hot-spring resorts, like Beitou on the edge of Taipei.

hazards.note: Typhoon season

seasonal.d: Spring and autumn are mild and pleasant; summer is hot and brings typhoon risk.

TW.summary: Night markets, mountain gorges and hot springs around an easy rail loop.

activities.d: The endless Serengeti plains hold vast herds and predators — the heart of the Great Migration.
Kilimanjaro, Africa's highest peak, is a walkable (if demanding) multi-day trek to its snowy summit.
Zanzibar's spice-island beaches and historic Stone Town make a perfect post-safari unwind.
The Ngorongoro Crater is a collapsed volcano packed with wildlife — a natural game-viewing amphitheatre.

hazards.note: Long rains — many safari camps close

seasonal.d: Jan-Mar is calving season in the southern Serengeti; Jun-Oct the herds move north — both superb.
The drier months (Jun-Oct, Jan-Feb) are the clearest, safest windows for climbing Kilimanjaro.

activities.d: Kyiv's gold-domed monasteries, like the Lavra and St Sophia, crown the capital above the Dnipro.
Lviv is a charming Central-European old town of cobbled squares and a celebrated coffeehouse culture.
The Ukrainian Carpathians offer green hiking, wooden churches and folk traditions.
Odesa is a grand Black Sea port city known for its opera house and the Potemkin Steps.

seasonal.d: Late spring and early autumn bring the mildest, most pleasant weather.

UA.summary: Golden-domed Kyiv and Carpathian villages — currently at war; Do Not Travel advisory.

activities.d: Bwindi Impenetrable Forest offers life-changing treks to see mountain gorillas up close.
Queen Elizabeth National Park has classic savanna safaris and famous tree-climbing lions.
Jinja, at the source of the Nile, is East Africa's adventure hub for white-water rafting.
Kibale Forest has one of the best chimpanzee-tracking experiences in Africa.

hazards.note: Heaviest rainy season

seasonal.d: The drier months (Jun-Sep and Dec-Feb) are best for gorilla trekking and safaris.

UG.summary: Gorillas, the Nile's source and big-game parks.

activities.d: The US has 63 national parks — the Grand Canyon, Yosemite and Yellowstone are bucket-list landscapes.
New York, with its skyline, museums and Broadway, is the iconic American city break.
Coastlines run from Florida and California to Hawaii, so there's somewhere warm almost year-round.
Vast distances make the US a road-trip country — historic Route 66 and the Pacific Coast Highway are classics.

seasonal.d: Late spring to early fall is when nearly all parks, including high-altitude roads, are fully open.
Late September into October paints New England and the Northeast in brilliant autumn colour.

US.summary: National parks, big cities and coast-to-coast variety.

activities.d: Punta del Este is South America's glitzy summer beach resort, busiest over New Year.
Montevideo's old town and long riverside rambla give the laid-back capital its charm.
Carmelo is the heart of Uruguay's Tannat wine country, an easy ferry from Buenos Aires.
Colonia del Sacramento is a tiny, cobbled UNESCO-listed colonial town on the river.

seasonal.d: Dec-Feb (southern summer) is beach season on the Atlantic coast, peaking in January.

UY.summary: Laid-back beaches, asado and colonial Colonia.

activities.d: Samarkand's Registan — three towering tiled madrasas around a plaza — is the jewel of the Silk Road.
Bukhara is a living Silk Road city of mosques, minarets and old trading domes.
Khiva's walled inner city, Itchan Kala, is a remarkably intact open-air museum.
Tashkent mixes Soviet boulevards with lively bazaars and Uzbekistan's beloved plov.

hazards.note: Desert heat — Samarkand and Bukhara regularly top 100F / 38C

seasonal.d: Spring and autumn are the most comfortable for touring the Silk Road cities, avoiding extreme heat and cold.

UZ.summary: Silk Road cities: turquoise domes of Samarkand, Bukhara and Khiva.

activities.d: Angel Falls in Canaima is the world's tallest waterfall, dropping almost a kilometre off a tabletop mountain.
Los Roques is a Caribbean archipelago of dazzling white cays and turquoise shallows.
Mount Roraima, a sheer-sided 'lost world' tepui, is a multi-day trek up to a prehistoric plateau.
Merida, in the Venezuelan Andes, offers mountain scenery and one of the world's highest cable cars.

seasonal.d: The rainy season (roughly Jun-Nov) puts Angel Falls at its thundering best, and is when boats can reach it.
Dec-Apr is the dry season — the best window for the Caribbean cays and beaches.

VE.summary: Angel Falls and Caribbean cays — extraordinary nature under a Do Not Travel advisory.

activities.d: Ha Long Bay's thousands of limestone islets rising from emerald water are best seen on an overnight boat cruise.
Hanoi's chaotic Old Quarter is the place for pho, egg coffee and bia hoi on tiny plastic stools.
Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon) has Vietnam's liveliest nightlife — rooftop bars and the buzzing backpacker streets of Bui Vien.
Lantern-lit Hoi An is famous for its riverside old town and fast, affordable custom tailoring.

hazards.note: Typhoon and flooding season in central Vietnam (Hue, Hoi An, Da Nang)

seasonal.d: The central coast (Da Nang, Hoi An, Nha Trang) is driest and best for beaches roughly Feb-Aug.
The north (Hanoi, Sapa) is clearest and driest around Oct-Apr, with cool mountain trekking among rice terraces.

VN.summary: Halong Bay, street food, history and motorbike routes north to south.

activities.d: Vanuatu offers warm-water diving, including the wreck of the SS President Coolidge.
Tanna's Mount Yasur is one of the world's most accessible active volcanoes — peer into its glowing crater.
Blue holes, lagoons and beaches dot the lush, scattered islands.
Vanuatu's strong custom ('kastom') culture and ceremonies are a major draw.

hazards.note: South Pacific cyclone season

seasonal.d: Apr-Oct is the cooler, drier season — the best time to visit.
Apr-Jun, men on Pentecost island perform the original 'land diving' bungee ritual.

VU.summary: Stand at the rim of a live lava lake, then snorkel a sunken liner.

activities.d: Prizren is Kosovo's prettiest town, with an Ottoman old quarter beneath a hilltop fortress.
The Rugova Canyon near Peja offers via ferrata, hiking and dramatic mountain scenery.
Kosovo's slice of the Via Dinarica and Accursed Mountains is superb, uncrowded hiking.
Pristina is a young, lively capital with a famously good cafe and nightlife scene.

seasonal.d: Jun-Sep is the season for hiking the high western mountains.

XK.summary: Europe's youngest country: Ottoman bazaars, monasteries and accursed-mountain hikes.

activities.d: Socotra island is an otherworldly UNESCO site, famous for its umbrella-shaped dragon-blood trees.
Sana'a's old city is a fairytale of gingerbread-like tower houses, inhabited for over 2,500 years.
Shibam is the 'Manhattan of the desert' — 16th-century mud-brick high-rises.
Socotra also has pristine white beaches where dunes spill against the mountains.

seasonal.d: Oct-Apr brings calm seas and accessible flights to Socotra, between the monsoon winds.

YE.summary: Sana'a's gingerbread towers and Socotra's alien dragon-blood trees — Do Not Travel; Socotra has separate charters.

activities.d: Cape Town sits beneath flat-topped Table Mountain, with beaches, the Cape Peninsula and penguins nearby.
Kruger National Park is one of Africa's great Big Five safari destinations, and easily self-driven.
The Cape Winelands around Stellenbosch offer world-class wine estates in mountain-ringed valleys.
The Garden Route is a classic coastal drive of forests, beaches and lagoons along the southern cape.

seasonal.d: The dry winter (May-Sep) thins the bush and draws animals to waterholes — the best game viewing.
Jun-Nov, southern right whales come close to shore at Hermanus, a top land-based whale-watching spot.
Summer (Nov-Mar) is Cape Town's warm, dry beach and outdoor season.

ZA.summary: Safari, Cape Town, the Garden Route and whale watching.

activities.d: From Livingstone you face Victoria Falls — 'the smoke that thunders' — one of the world's great waterfalls.
South Luangwa pioneered the walking safari and has superb leopard sightings.
When the river is low, you can swim in the Devil's Pool right on the very lip of Victoria Falls.
The Lower Zambezi offers canoe safaris drifting past elephants and hippos.

hazards.note: Rainy season — many safari camps close

seasonal.d: May-Oct is the dry season — the best game viewing as animals gather at water.
The Devil's Pool only opens when the river is low, roughly Aug-Jan.

ZM.summary: Victoria Falls' Devil's Pool and the home of the walking safari.

activities.d: Zimbabwe holds the widest, most face-on views of Victoria Falls, with rainforest walks along the gorge.
Hwange is Zimbabwe's largest park, famous for its huge elephant herds.
Great Zimbabwe's vast stone-walled ruins are the namesake of the nation and a medieval African capital.
Mana Pools is a UNESCO wilderness famed for walking and canoe safaris on the Zambezi.

seasonal.d: After the rains (roughly Mar-Jun) Victoria Falls is at its thundering, spray-soaked peak.
The dry season (Aug-Oct) brings the best game viewing as animals crowd the waterholes.

ZW.summary: The thundering main face of Victoria Falls, Hwange's elephants and Great Zimbabwe.
